title: OrganiGram Holdings (OGI) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: OrganiGram Holdings Q4 2022 Earnings Results. Financial Performance: OrganiGram's Q4 net revenue was $45.5 million, an 83% increase over Q4 2021, and their sixth consecutive quarter of record revenue growth. This was the highest net revenue in the history of the Company, up 83% from $24.9 million in the same prior-year period and 19% from $38.1 million in Q3 Fiscal 2022. Adjusted EBITDA: The company reported Adjusted EBITDA of $3.2 million, the third consecutive quarter of positive Adjusted EBITDA, compared to negative Adjusted EBITDA of $4.8 million in the same prior year period. Adjusted Gross Margin: Adjusted Gross Margin was $10.4 million or 23%, compared to $3.0 million or 12% in the same prior year period, reflecting improvements from increased efficiencies and higher sales volume. Full Year 2022 Performance: For fiscal 2022, OrganiGram generated net revenue of $146 million, an 84% increase over fiscal 2021. The company became adjusted EBITDA positive in Q2 and delivered three consecutive quarters of positive earnings. Earnings call held November 29, 2022.
